common.description: WARDEN develops physical products to enhance the gaming experience in BattleTech Classic, Alpha Strike and AeroTech. Functionality, compatibility, robustness and clarity.

footer.brandDesc: Precision equipment designed to enhance the gaming experience in BattleTech Classic, Alpha Strike and AeroTech.
footer.noAffiliation: No affiliation with Topps or Catalyst Game Labs.

home.heroDesc: WARDEN develops physical products that eliminate friction in every phase of BattleTech Classic, Alpha Strike and AeroTech. No decoration. No filler. Just precision tools that earn their place on the table.

wardenCore.title: WARDEN Core
wardenCore.desc: Brass, aluminum and acrylic tools for BattleTech Classic. Hex markers, heat dials, armor sliders — built for hundreds of sessions.

licensedUniverses.title: Licensed Universes
licensedUniverses.desc: Collaborations with independent creators and studios. Bespoke tools, unique aesthetics, WARDEN manufacturing standards.

bundles.title: Bundles
bundles.desc: Curated sets at a reduced price. Commander Pack, Aerospace Bundle, Starter Kit — everything in one package.

communitySupport.title: Community Support
communitySupport.desc: Product guides, FAQs and community channels. Wardens helping wardens across all three game systems.

home.featuredDesc: Our most used tools, tested across thousands of game sessions.

principle1.title: Design to play
principle1.desc: Every WARDEN product starts with a gameplay problem. If a tool doesn't speed up a phase, clarify a rule, or reduce cognitive load, it doesn't get made. No decoration. No filler. Just function.

principle2.title: Build to last
principle2.desc: Brass, aluminum and acrylic machined with precise tolerances. Each material is selected for its mechanical properties and validated across hundreds of sessions. A WARDEN tool must survive the campaign.

principle3.title: Evolve without losing identity
principle3.desc: New products, new systems, new materials — but the same commitment to clarity, compatibility and coherence. Each collection adds capability without fragmenting the experience.

home.processDesc: We don't operate with direct checkout. Here's how to get WARDEN products for your table.
home.step1Desc: Browse the catalog and add products to your Selection. No account needed.
home.step2Desc: Submit your Selection with your contact details. We review and respond with price, availability and delivery times.
home.step3Desc: Once confirmed, your order enters production. Small-batch manufacturing to guarantee quality. International shipping.

about.heroP1: WARDEN develops physical precision equipment for the gaming experience in BattleTech Classic, Alpha Strike and AeroTech. Each product is born from a real need on the table: reducing mechanical friction, speeding up game phases and clarifying the state of play.
about.heroP2: We don't manufacture decoration. We manufacture tools that earn their place on the table. If a product doesn't solve a concrete problem — whether speed, clarity or cognitive load — it doesn't get made.
about.missionText: Eliminate mechanical and cognitive friction from tabletop wargaming through physical tools designed with technical criteria, manufactured with industrial materials, and validated across hundreds of real game sessions.
about.visionText: To be the reference standard in functional accessories for sci-fi wargaming, maintaining the commitment to manufacturing quality, compatibility with official systems, and a design ethic where function determines form.
about.principlesDesc: Six principles that govern every design, material and production decision.
about.systemsDesc: WARDEN designs and tests its products for the three main systems of the BattleTech ecosystem.
about.philosophyTitle: Design to play. Build to last.
about.philosophyDesc: Three principles that define how we think, design and manufacture.
about.historyDesc: From the community to the catalog. The milestones that have defined the project.
about.dnaDesc: Six principles that govern every engineering and manufacturing decision.
about.ctaDesc: All WARDEN products are organized by collection and system. Each sheet includes technical specifications, compatibility and usage guides.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The resource you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

selection.title: My Selection
selection.emptyDesc: Browse the catalog and start adding products to your Selection.
